justification: All 7 ACs covered with explicit test names referencing each AC. AC6 boundary correctly tested as valid (amount=10000 succeeds for both credit_card and bank_transfer). AC7 whitespace tested with '   ', ' ', and '\t\n'. AC2 fee arithmetic verified numerically (fee===1.5 and refundAmount===amount-1.5). Boundary values exact: 0 for AC4, 10001 for AC5, 10000 for AC6. Only test file created, no implementation changes. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs to test names. deviations section is empty.

observations.text: All 7 ACs have dedicated describe blocks with explicit AC references in test names
AC6 correctly tests 10000 as valid boundary — three assertions including bank_transfer fee deduction
AC7 tests three whitespace variants ('   ', ' ', '\t\n'), exceeding the minimum requirement
AC2 verifies exact fee arithmetic: fee===1.5 and refundAmount===amount-1.5
Boundary values are exact: 0, 10000, 10001 — not arbitrary values
No implementation files modified — test-only change
acceptance_criteria_coverage is complete with all 7 ACs mapped to test names and notes
